response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with ~15 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) at re:cinq, but the resume shows no evidence of director-level IC scope, recognized AI expertise, AI/ML products at scale, or advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption. Background is primarily hands-on product engineering across web/mobile/embedded rather than principal-level AI strategy.
strengths: ~15 years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic) systems
Recent AI-agent infra work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial track record founding and running GISCollective open-source platform
concerns: No demonstrated principal/director-level IC scope or recognized AI thought leadership
Lacks advanced AI/ML degree and shipped AI products or platforms at scale
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on cloud and AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Principal/director-level IC scope and external influence
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
